content.en:
Like other forces, Ye Tian also sent many top Terran Domain Ancestors to the Dark Soul Domain, but due to the limited quota, he could only send 30,000 top domain ancestors.

Once these 30,000 top domain ancestors enter the Dark Soul Domain, about a small number of them will be able to break through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm.

In this way, it can also increase the strength of the Ten Directions Saint Realm Human Race, and it can also reduce some of Ye Tian's pressure.

After these top domain ancestors poured into the Dark Soul Domain, they did not fight with each other, but they encountered the targeting of local forces.

After all, the local forces have also risen now, and they have local advantages, they are taken care of by the luck of the Dark Soul Domain, and their cultivation is easier, and many demonic existences have also been born in them, which are not weaker than the Dark Sacred Domain, the Dark Destruction Domain, and the Eternal Sect's domain ancestors.

After a fight, neither side could help anyone, so they gave up.

But after these top domain ancestors break through to the strongest domain ancestors, the Dark Soul Domain will attract a new round of competition.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time, the first batch of Supreme Domain Ancestors was born.

Outside the Ten Directions Saint Realm, groups of Domain Ancestors and Soul Ancestors came here.

Among them, the leader is three evil saints, one of whom is the Scorpion Holy Son, and the other two are from the Demon Hell Clan and the Dream Clan.

The top domain ancestors who were able to enter the Dark Soul Domain to lead the three clans, their strength could be imagined, and they must be far beyond ordinary people, even among the Holy Endowments, they were among the top ranks.

Now, their three great saints have stepped into the ranks of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, and even under the treasures given by the ancestors, they forcibly raised their cultivation to the peak realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Soul Domain.

Of course, if they want to condense the Holy Light of the Soul, and then condense the Holy Soul, then they want a long time.

If you don't care about the foundation problem, you can also forcibly impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, and the ancestors also have a way.

However, it is useless to fight for a while, even if a few invincible domain ancestors are born, there is no way to change anything.

Moreover, no Saint Endowment was willing to waste his talent and destroy his foundation to forcibly break through the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

This time.

The Scorpion Holy Son, that is, the Scorpion Domain Ancestor and the other three Holy Endowers, led tens of thousands of Supreme Domain Ancestors to the Ten Directions Saint Realm, which was to clean up the human race and occupy the Ten Directions Saint Realm, which was also one of the orders given to them by the ancestors.

"Evil Wind Domain Ancestor, Dark Eagle Domain Ancestor, wait for our three major saints to attack and kill the leader of the celebrity race in the Ten Directions Holy Realm, Qingye Soul Ancestor, and strive to kill him instantly. "

Scorpion Domain Ancestor proposed.

"No problem, this is just a very simple matter, that Qingye Soul Ancestor was just a half-step Domain Ancestor at the beginning, and when he came to the Dark Soul Domain, although his cultivation improved quickly, and now he is the strongest Soul Ancestor, but his cultivation time is short, and he has no cultivation, but it is estimated that he has not mastered a few powerful soul skills, even if he is also a saint endower, but it is estimated that he has not even mastered a holy skill of the consummation realm. Besides, the Soul Ancestor uses the Holy Technique of the Dark Sacred Domain to greatly reduce its power, and there are probably only a few Holy Techniques suitable for the Soul Ancestor, and it is too late to learn it now. And our three great Saints have all mastered two Perfection Saint Techniques, so it is naturally very easy to kill a Supreme Soul Ancestor!" said the Dark Eagle Domain Ancestor with confidence.

"Be careful, this is an order from the Ancestor. "

Scorpion Domain Ancestor reminded.

The Eagle Domain Ancestor and the Qingye Soul Ancestor nodded, and immediately led many Supreme Domain Ancestors and a large number of top Domain Ancestors to the Ten Directions Saint Realm.

With their strength, they can crush the past.

......

"Lord Aoba Soul Ancestor, there are a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors who have killed our Ten Directions Saint Realm!"

A Terran Supreme Domain Ancestor reported to Ye Tian.

Aoba Yuzu is the identity of this copy body, no one knows that this is Ye Tian's copy body, even the human race doesn't know.

Moreover, the method that Ye Tian is using now is completely new, so no one can guess it.

"Let them enter the Ten Directions Saint Realm, and when the time comes, you will urge the Great Array of the Stone Ten Directions Saint Realm, and no one will be allowed to escape!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Lord Aoba Soul Ancestor, there are too many people on the other side, I'm worried about ......"

The supreme domain ancestor of the human race obviously didn't know Ye Tian's strength, so he was worried.

"Don't worry, I can kill them all, you can help!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!"

The Supreme Domain Ancestor nodded.

---------------------

The strongest domain ancestors and top domain ancestors of the three major evil clans easily entered the Ten Directions Saint Realm, and immediately slaughtered towards the base camp of the human race.

Bang!!!!!

The Ten Directions Sacred Realm was blocked, and a Celebrity Clan Supreme Domain Ancestor appeared.

And Ye Tian stood at the forefront, his eyes looking directly at the supreme domain ancestors of the three major evil clans.

The two sides did not speak, and directly exchanged hands.

"Kill!"

The three great saints of the Scorpion Domain Ancestor, the Dark Eagle Domain Ancestor, and the Evil Wind Domain Ancestor found Ye Tian for the first time.

Thundered!!!!

The three consummation holy techniques were unleashed, blocking Ye Tian's four voids.

"Aoba Soul Ancestor be careful, these are the three Saint Endowments!!!"

The other Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Terran were worried.

However, Ye Tian smiled coldly: "Three saints, just ants!"

I saw Ye Tian wave his hand, and countless soul golden threads appeared.

"Holy Technique - Soul Golden Thread!"

This is not the soul gold wire of the consummation realm, but the soul gold wire of the extreme realm.

Moreover, the Soul Golden Silk Saint Technique created by Ye Tian was the top Saint Technique, very close to the Ancestral Technique.

However, Ye Tian has not yet created the soul gold wire at the ancestral skill level for the time being, after all, it is not good to be too high-profile now, otherwise with Ye Tian having practiced a large number of consummate realm ancestral skills, it will not be difficult to advance the soul gold wire to the ancestral skill level.

Puff puff!!!

The three Saint Grants were cut apart, and their three major Saint Skill attacks fell on Ye Tian's body, which was blocked by Ye Tian's Spiritual Light Armor and failed to hurt Ye Tian.

And the Holy Skill of the Spiritual Light Saint Armor was also cultivated to the limit by Ye Tian.

"It's not good, the Extreme Realm Holy Technique, how is this possible, how can the Human Race still have such a demonic Holy Ender? Could it be that he is a descendant of the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor?"

But they felt that something was wrong.

The Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor does have descendants, but they are descendants born before he became the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and they are not the Aoba Soul Ancestor!

Although there are treasures in the Dark Forbidden Realm that allow people to give birth to holy endowments, they are too rare, and the holy endowments created are definitely not truly holy endowment demons.

Qingye Soul Ancestor has only been a Soul Ancestor for 100 million years, why is this little time enough?

Could it be that when the Aoba Domain Ancestor was a half-step Domain Ancestor, he mastered the Holy Technique of the Extreme Realm?

This is absolutely impossible, the Dark Forbidden Realm has never given birth to such a demonic existence.

Then there is only one possibility, that is, the Aoba Soul Ancestor found a treasure in the Dark Soul Domain that can quickly assist in comprehending the Holy Technique, which allowed him to raise the Holy Technique to the limit in a short period of time.

Now.

The Scorpion Domain Ancestor regretted it very much, but it was too late.

Puff puff!!!

Under the golden thread of the soul, their three holy endowments couldn't resist at all.

After a while, they were killed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian swept through the armies of the three evil clans alone, and a large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors and Top Domain Ancestors were killed by him alone.

Some Supreme Domain Ancestors and Top Domain Ancestors wanted to escape, but they were trapped by the Human Race Supreme Domain Ancestors and the Great Array, and none of them escaped.

At this point, the three evil armies have all fallen.
